office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An incumbent representative with legislative and human-services experience faces an Army veteran and health-care leader emphasizing fiscal restraint and accountability.

candidates.summary: Richardson is an Army veteran, nurse practitioner, educator, and business owner advocating fiscal restraint and measurable government performance.
highlights: Brings military, health-care, education, and business experience [S2]
Calls for fiscal restraint, transparent spending, accountability, and measurable outcomes [S2]

spending.basis: She explicitly calls for fiscal restraint, transparent spending, accountability, and measurable outcomes.

experience.basis: She brings substantial professional leadership but no documented elected record.

candidates.summary: Leavitt is an incumbent representative and former county human-services administrator focused on education, workforce, veterans, human services, housing, and safety.
highlights: Brings incumbent legislative and county human-services experience [S1][S2]
Prioritizes education, workforce training, veterans, human services, housing, and public safety [S1][S2]

experience.basis: She is an incumbent representative with prior county administrative experience.
